title: epipactis helleborine subsp. condensata
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. condensata, also known as the dense helleborine or condensate helleborine, is a type of orchid native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits associated with Epipactis helleborine subsp. condensata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of infusions or teas, are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
